headline: Oh My Codex Standardizes Multi-Step AI Development Workflows
lede: We are architecting the bridge between chaotic prompt-based coding and disciplined engineering. By formalizing project state management within a hidden directory, this framework turns the command line into a persistent, multi-agent development environment.

headline: Onyx Delivers Secure, Self-Hosted AI Intelligence for Modern Teams
lede: Scalability requires control, and this platform offers a robust foundation for deploying private, enterprise-grade AI infrastructure. It reconciles high-scale document indexing with strict role-based access, ensuring your organization maintains full sovereignty over its knowledge graphs.

headline: Google Research Updates TimesFM for High-Context Time-Series Forecasting
lede: The latest 2.5 release slims the architecture to 200M parameters while expanding the context window to 16k. This foundation model marks a shift toward generative forecasting that excels without the need for task-specific retraining.

headline: OpenScreen Empowers Creators With Transparent Desktop Recording Tools
lede: Professional-grade product demos no longer require restrictive subscription models. This open-source implementation brings timeline-based editing and motion-blur zooming to a lightweight interface built on React and PixiJS.

headline: FFF.nvim Accelerates Code Navigation and AI Agent Context Retrieval
lede: Speed is the only metric that matters when parsing massive repositories. By leveraging a high-performance binary backend, this utility provides your editor and AI assistants with near-instant file indexing based on git status and access patterns.

headline: Prompts.chat Hits Major Milestone as Global Standard for Prompt Engineering
lede: With over 150,000 stars, this repository has become the industry standard for curated AI interaction. It provides the essential infrastructure for developers and educators to standardize how they communicate with large language models.

headline: Sherlock Automates Digital Footprint Verification Across Social Networks
lede: Transparency is a two-way street in the age of digital identity. This utility allows professionals to audit online presence across hundreds of platforms, providing a necessary, defiant look at publicly available data footprints.

headline: The Essential Compendium of Modern Prompt Engineering Strategies
lede: We curate the foundational literature and dataset standards that define contemporary AI interaction. These resources provide the academic rigor necessary for both newcomers and advanced practitioners to refine their prompt design process.

headline: Optimizing RAG Pipelines Through Advanced Hybrid Search Integration
lede: Connecting isolated knowledge nodes into a coherent stream is the hallmark of modern RAG systems. We examine the movement of data from external connectors into vector spaces, ensuring high-throughput access for contextual AI responses.

headline: Rapid Iteration Strategies for Emerging AI-Native CLI Applications
lede: Sometimes the best ideas start as a scribbled script or a quick CLI hack. We highlight the prototypes that challenge existing paradigms, turning experimental logic into the refined tools we use to build tomorrow.
